name: Fried Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggplant and cut into 1/4 inch slices, crosswise.
2. Sprinkle the eggplant with salt and pepper and dredge in flour.
3. Whisk together the eggs and milk.
4. Dip the eggplant slices into the egg mixture and roll in fine crumbs until completely covered. Shake off excess.
5. Let stand in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
6. Heat about 2 inches of shortening or oil in a heavy skillet until hot enough to fry (365-370 degrees).
7. Fry breaded eggplant slices 2 to 4 minutes on each side or until golden brown and crisp.
8. Drain on paper towels and serve.
